experiment: 16-tile BF16 GEMM via NEW IRON + memtile forwarding
toolchain: IRON (new build) + Peano + aie_api — OPEN SOURCE, NO CHESS
gap_analysis: At 82 GFLOPS on 16 tiles (half the NPU), the open-source stack achieves 0.27% of Chess's 30.1 TFLOPS on 32 tiles. With proper K-tiling, BFP16 block-float, and 32-tile DMA management, this gap is engineering effort, not fundamental.
